creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->danfe

Over to maintainer 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=109525 

 From: linimon

 Adding to audit trail from private feedback from piso@:

 diff -rNPu nvidia-driver.orig/Makefile nvidia-driver/Makefile
 --- nvidia-driver.orig/Makefile	Sun Feb 25 15:11:25 2007
 +++ nvidia-driver/Makefile	Sun Feb 25 15:15:52 2007
 @@ -56,6 +56,10 @@
${FILESDIR}/crash-patch-by-zander-1759235
  .endif
  
 +.if ${OSVERSION} >= 700031
 +EXTRA_PATCHES+= ${FILESDIR}/intr_filter-src::nvidia_pci
 +.endif
 +
  .if ${OSVERSION} >= 600033
  LIB_DEPENDS+=	m.3:${PORTSDIR}/misc/compat5x
  .endif
 diff -rNPu nvidia-driver.orig/files/intr_filter-src::nvidia_pci nvidia-driver/files/intr_filter-src::nvidia_pci
 --- nvidia-driver.orig/files/intr_filter-src::nvidia_pci	Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
 +++ nvidia-driver/files/intr_filter-src::nvidia_pci	Sun Feb 25 15:10:57 2007
 @@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
 +--- src/nvidia_pci.c.orig	Sat Feb 24 20:22:08 2007
 ++++ src/nvidia_pci.c	Sat Feb 24 20:23:23 2007
 +@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@
 +     /* XXX Revisit! (INTR_FAST, INTR_MPSAFE) */
 +     flags = INTR_TYPE_AV;
 + 
 +-    status = bus_setup_intr(dev, sc->irq, flags, nvidia_intr, sc, &sc->irq_ih);
 ++    status = bus_setup_intr(dev, sc->irq, flags, NULL, nvidia_intr, sc, &sc->irq_ih);
 +     if (status) {
 +         device_printf(dev, "NVRM: HW ISR setup failed.\n");
 +         goto fail;
